65	    "build:wasm": "node build/wasm.js --docker",

67	    "lint": "eslint --cache",
68	    "lint:fix": "eslint --fix --cache",

71	    "test:javascript:no-jest": "npm run generate-pem && npm run test:unit && npm run test:node-fetch && npm run test:cache && npm run test:cache-interceptor && npm run test:interceptors && npm run test:fetch && npm run test:cookies && npm run test:eventsource && npm run test:subresource-integrity && npm run test:wpt && npm run test:websocket && npm run test:node-test && npm run test:cache-tests",

77	    "test:cookies": "borp -p \"test/cookie/*.js\"",

98	    "test:wpt:withoutintl": "node test/wpt/start-fetch.mjs && node test/wpt/start-mimesniff.mjs && node test/wpt/start-xhr.mjs && node test/wpt/start-cacheStorage.mjs && node test/wpt/start-eventsource.mjs",

101	    "coverage:ci": "npm run coverage:clean && cross-env NODE_V8_COVERAGE=./coverage/tmp npm run test:javascript && npm run coverage:report:ci",
102	    "coverage:clean": "node ./scripts/clean-coverage.js",

108	  },

{
  "name": "undici",
  "version": "7.15.0",
  "description": "An HTTP/1.1 client, written from scratch for Node.js",
  "homepage": "https://undici.nodejs.org",
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/nodejs/undici/issues"
  },
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "git+https://github.com/nodejs/undici.git"
  },
  "license": "MIT",
  "contributors": [
    {
      "name": "Daniele Belardi",
      "url": "https://github.com/dnlup",
      "author": true
    },
    {
      "name": "Ethan Arrowood",
      "url": "https://github.com/ethan-arrowood",
      "author": true
    },
    {
      "name": "Matteo Collina",
      "url": "https://github.com/mcollina",
      "author": true
    },
    {
      "name": "Matthew Aitken",
      "url": "https://github.com/KhafraDev",
      "author": true
    },
    {
      "name": "Robert Nagy",
      "url": "https://github.com/ronag",
      "author": true
    },
    {
      "name": "Szymon Marczak",
      "url": "https://github.com/szmarczak",
      "author": true
    },
    {
      "name": "Tomas Della Vedova",
      "url": "https://github.com/delvedor",
      "author": true
    }
  ],
  "keywords": [
    "fetch",
    "http",
    "https",
    "promise",
    "request",
    "curl",
    "wget",
    "xhr",
    "whatwg"
  ],
  "main": "index.js",
  "types": "index.d.ts",
  "scripts": {
    "build:node": "esbuild index-fetch.js --bundle --platform=node --outfile=undici-fetch.js --define:esbuildDetection=1 --keep-names && node scripts/strip-comments.js",
    "build:wasm": "node build/wasm.js --docker",
    "generate-pem": "node scripts/generate-pem.js",
    "lint": "eslint --cache",
    "lint:fix": "eslint --fix --cache",
    "test": "npm run test:javascript && cross-env NODE_V8_COVERAGE=  npm run test:typescript",
    "test:javascript": "npm run test:javascript:no-jest && npm run test:jest",
    "test:javascript:no-jest": "npm run generate-pem && npm run test:unit && npm run test:node-fetch && npm run test:cache && npm run test:cache-interceptor && npm run test:interceptors && npm run test:fetch && npm run test:cookies && npm run test:eventsource && npm run test:subresource-integrity && npm run test:wpt && npm run test:websocket && npm run test:node-test && npm run test:cache-tests",
    "test:javascript:without-intl": "npm run test:javascript:no-jest",
    "test:busboy": "borp -p \"test/busboy/*.js\"",
    "test:cache": "borp -p \"test/cache/*.js\"",
    "test:sqlite": "NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-sqlite borp -p \"test/cache-interceptor/*.js\"",
    "test:cache-interceptor": "borp -p \"test/cache-interceptor/*.js\"",
    "test:cookies": "borp -p \"test/cookie/*.js\"",
    "test:eventsource": "npm run build:node && borp --expose-gc -p \"test/eventsource/*.js\"",
    "test:fuzzing": "node test/fuzzing/fuzzing.test.js",
    "test:fetch": "npm run build:node && borp --timeout 180000 --expose-gc --concurrency 1 -p \"test/fetch/*.js\" && npm run test:webidl && npm run test:busboy",
    "test:subresource-integrity": "borp -p \"test/subresource-integrity/*.js\"",
    "test:h2": "npm run test:h2:core && npm run test:h2:fetch",
    "test:h2:core": "borp -p \"test/+(http2|h2)*.js\"",
    "test:h2:fetch": "npm run build:node && borp -p \"test/fetch/http2*.js\"",
    "test:interceptors": "borp -p \"test/interceptors/*.js\"",
    "test:jest": "cross-env NODE_V8_COVERAGE= jest",
    "test:unit": "borp --expose-gc -p \"test/*.js\"",
    "test:node-fetch": "borp -p \"test/node-fetch/**/*.js\"",
    "test:node-test": "borp -p \"test/node-test/**/*.js\"",
    "test:tdd": "borp --expose-gc -p \"test/*.js\"",
    "test:tdd:node-test": "borp -p \"test/node-test/**/*.js\" -w",
    "test:typescript": "tsd && tsc test/imports/undici-import.ts --typeRoots ./types --noEmit && tsc ./types/*.d.ts --noEmit --typeRoots ./types",
    "test:webidl": "borp -p \"test/webidl/*.js\"",
    "test:websocket": "borp -p \"test/websocket/**/*.js\"",
    "test:websocket:autobahn": "node test/autobahn/client.js",
    "test:websocket:autobahn:report": "node test/autobahn/report.js",
    "test:wpt": "node test/wpt/start-fetch.mjs && node test/wpt/start-mimesniff.mjs && node test/wpt/start-xhr.mjs && node test/wpt/start-websockets.mjs && node test/wpt/start-cacheStorage.mjs && node test/wpt/start-eventsource.mjs",
    "test:wpt:withoutintl": "node test/wpt/start-fetch.mjs && node test/wpt/start-mimesniff.mjs && node test/wpt/start-xhr.mjs && node test/wpt/start-cacheStorage.mjs && node test/wpt/start-eventsource.mjs",
    "test:cache-tests": "node test/cache-interceptor/cache-tests.mjs --ci",
    "coverage": "npm run coverage:clean && cross-env NODE_V8_COVERAGE=./coverage/tmp npm run test:javascript && npm run coverage:report",
    "coverage:ci": "npm run coverage:clean && cross-env NODE_V8_COVERAGE=./coverage/tmp npm run test:javascript && npm run coverage:report:ci",
    "coverage:clean": "node ./scripts/clean-coverage.js",
    "coverage:report": "cross-env NODE_V8_COVERAGE= c8 report",
    "coverage:report:ci": "c8 report",
    "bench": "echo \"Error: Benchmarks have been moved to '/benchmarks'\" && exit 1",
    "serve:website": "echo \"Error: Documentation has been moved to '/docs'\" && exit 1",
    "prepare": "husky && node ./scripts/platform-shell.js"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@fastify/busboy": "3.2.0",
    "@matteo.collina/tspl": "^0.2.0",
    "@metcoder95/https-pem": "^1.0.0",
    "@sinonjs/fake-timers": "^12.0.0",
    "@types/node": "^18.19.50",
    "abort-controller": "^3.0.0",
    "borp": "^0.20.0",
    "c8": "^10.0.0",
    "cross-env": "^10.0.0",
    "dns-packet": "^5.4.0",

content.content:
0	'use strict'
1	
2	const { createServer, createSecureServer } = require('node:http2')
3	const { once } = require('node:events')
4	const { test } = require('node:test')
5	
6	const { tspl } = require('@matteo.collina/tspl')
7	const pem = require('@metcoder95/https-pem')
8	
9	const { H2CClient } = require('..')
10	
11	test('Should throw if no h2c origin', async t => {
12	  const planner = tspl(t, { plan: 1 })
13	
14	  planner.throws(() => new H2CClient('https://localhost/'))
15	
16	  await planner.completed
17	})
18	
19	test('Should throw if pipelining greather than concurrent streams', async t => {
20	  const planner = tspl(t, { plan: 1 })
21	
22	  planner.throws(() => new H2CClient('http://localhost/', { pipelining: 10, maxConcurrentStreams: 5 }))
23	
24	  await planner.completed
25	})
26	
27	test('Should support h2c connection', async t => {
28	  const planner = tspl(t, { plan: 2 })
29	
30	  const server = createServer((req, res) => {
31	    res.writeHead(200)
32	    res.end('Hello, world!')
33	  })
34	
35	  server.listen()
36	  await once(server, 'listening')
37	  const client = new H2CClient(`http://localhost:${server.address().port}/`)
38	
39	  t.after(() => client.close())
40	  t.after(() => server.close())
41	
42	  const response = await client
43	    .request({ path: '/', method: 'GET' })
44	    .catch(console.log)
45	  planner.equal(response.statusCode, 200)
46	  planner.equal(await response.body.text(), 'Hello, world!')
47	})
48	
49	test('Should support h2c connection with body', async t => {
50	  const planner = tspl(t, { plan: 3 })
51	  const bodyChunks = []
52	
53	  const server = createServer((req, res) => {
54	    req.on('data', chunk => bodyChunks.push(chunk))
55	    req.on('end', () => {
56	      res.end('Hello, world!')
57	    })
58	    res.writeHead(200, {
59	      'Content-Type': 'text/plain'
60	    })
61	  })
62	
63	  server.listen()
64	  await once(server, 'listening')
65	  const client = new H2CClient(`http://localhost:${server.address().port}/`)
66	
67	  t.after(() => client.close())
68	  t.after(() => server.close())
69	
70	  const response = await client.request({
71	    path: '/',
72	    method: 'POST',
73	    body: 'Hello, world!'
74	  })
75	  planner.equal(response.statusCode, 200)
76	  planner.equal(await response.body.text(), 'Hello, world!')
77	  planner.equal(Buffer.concat(bodyChunks).toString(), 'Hello, world!')
78	})
79	
80	test('Should support h2c connection', async t => {
81	  const planner = tspl(t, { plan: 2 })
82	
83	  const server = createServer((req, res) => {
84	    res.writeHead(200)
85	    res.end('Hello, world!')
86	  })
87	
88	  server.listen()
89	  await once(server, 'listening')
90	  const client = new H2CClient(`http://localhost:${server.address().port}/`)
91	
92	  t.after(() => client.close())
93	  t.after(() => server.close())
94	
95	  const response = await client.request({ path: '/', method: 'GET' })
96	  planner.equal(response.statusCode, 200)
97	  planner.equal(await response.body.text(), 'Hello, world!')
98	})
99	
100	test('Should reject request if not h2c supported', async t => {
101	  const planner = tspl(t, { plan: 1 })
102	
103	  const server = createSecureServer(await pem.generate({ opts: { keySize: 2048 } }), (req, res) => {
104	    res.writeHead(200)
105	    res.end('Hello, world!')
106	  })
107	
108	  server.on('sessionError', console.error)
109	  server.listen()
110	  await once(server, 'listening')
111	  const client = new H2CClient(`http://localhost:${server.address().port}/`)
112	
113	  t.after(() => client.close())
114	  t.after(() => server.close())
115	
116	  planner.rejects(
117	    client.request({ path: '/', method: 'GET' }),
118	    'SocketError: other side closed'
119	  )
120	})
121

0	'use strict'
1	
2	const { tspl } = require('@matteo.collina/tspl')
3	const { test, after } = require('node:test')
4	const { createSecureServer } = require('node:http2')
5	const { createReadStream, readFileSync } = require('node:fs')
6	const { once } = require('node:events')
7	const { Writable, pipeline, PassThrough, Readable } = require('node:stream')
8	
9	const pem = require('@metcoder95/https-pem')
10	
11	const { Client, Agent, FormData } = require('..')
12	
13	const isGreaterThanv20 = process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number)[0] >= 20
14	
15	test('Should support H2 connection', async t => {
16	  const body = []
17	  const server = createSecureServer(await pem.generate({ opts: { keySize: 2048 } }))
18	
19	  server.on('stream', (stream, headers, _flags, rawHeaders) => {
20	    t.strictEqual(headers['x-my-header'], 'foo')
21	    t.strictEqual(headers[':method'], 'GET')
22	    stream.respond({
23	      'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
24	      'x-custom-h2': 'hello',
25	      ':status': 200
26	    })
27	    stream.end('hello h2!')
28	  })
29	
30	  server.listen(0)
31	  await once(server, 'listening')
32	
33	  const client = new Client(`https://localhost:${server.address().port}`, {
34	    connect: {
35	      rejectUnauthorized: false
36	    },
37	    allowH2: true
38	  })
39	
40	  t = tspl(t, { plan: 6 })
41	  after(() => server.close())
42	  after(() => client.close())
43	
44	  const response = await client.request({
45	    path: '/',
46	    method: 'GET',
47	    headers: {
48	      'x-my-header': 'foo'
49	    }
50	  })
51	
52	  response.body.on('data', chunk => {
53	    body.push(chunk)
54	  })
55	
56	  await once(response.body, 'end')
57	  t.strictEqual(response.statusCode, 200)
58	  t.strictEqual(response.headers['content-type'], 'text/plain; charset=utf-8')
59	  t.strictEqual(response.headers['x-custom-h2'], 'hello')
60	  t.strictEqual(Buffer.concat(body).toString('utf8'), 'hello h2!')
61	})
62	
63	test('Should support H2 connection(multiple requests)', async t => {
64	  const server = createSecureServer(await pem.generate({ opts: { keySize: 2048 } }))
65	
66	  server.on('stream', async (stream, headers, _flags, rawHeaders) => {
67	    t.strictEqual(headers['x-my-header'], 'foo')
68	    t.strictEqual(headers[':method'], 'POST')
69	    const reqData = []
70	    stream.on('data', chunk => reqData.push(chunk.toString()))
71	    await once(stream, 'end')
72	    const reqBody = reqData.join('')
73	    t.strictEqual(reqBody.length > 0, true)
74	    stream.respond({
75	      'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',

content.text:
Implemented the HTTP/2 cookie header fix.

Summary:
- Updated `lib/dispatcher/client-h2.js` so repeated HTTP/2 `cookie` header values are joined with `"; "` instead of `", "`.
- Other repeated headers continue to use `", "` as before.
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the issue, confirmed it passed after the fix, then removed the temporary test as requested.
- Re-ran the cleaned test file successfully.

Validation:
- Temporary regression test passed before removal.
- Final test run passed:

```text
npx borp -p "test/h2c-client.js"
tests 6
pass 6
fail 0
```

Remaining working tree change:
- `lib/dispatcher/client-h2.js` only.
